data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Reward fulfillment automation', but the evidence does not provide any concrete details or mechanisms that demonstrate how rewards are fulfilled automatically. While the linked use case outlines a referral program and mentions rewards, it lacks specific information on the automation aspect of reward fulfillment, indicating a clear gap in the evidence. The absence of details on how the system automates the reward process means the requirement is not covered.
gaps: No evidence of how reward fulfillment is automated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
